experiences.name: Burj Khalifa: At The Top Level 124/125 Ticket
experiences.description:
Visit the Burj Khalifa and head to Levels 124 and 125 on the high-speed elevator. Look through the observation deck's floor-to-ceiling windows for a view of Dubai's skyline. 

Use the telescopes provided to get a closer look at key landmarks. Walk around the deck to take in the full 360º view of the city.

experiences.name: Aquaventure World: Waterpark Day Pass
experiences.description: Make a Burj Khalifa-sized splash at Aquaventure World in Dubai, and enjoy 17 sun-kissed hectares of the world's most extreme waterslides and adrenaline-pumping river rides. Additionally, relax on a pristine stretch of white sandy beach where you can kick up your feet, sip on a cold drink, and chill out in the cool sea breeze. Cannonballs away!

experiences.name: Museum of the Future: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
The future is now at the Museum of the Future! Dubai's latest architectural masterpiece invites guests for a transformative experience for anyone who steps through the door.

This one-of-a-kind attraction features immersive exhibits that let you explore the world of tomorrow. With experiences crafted by the world's leading product, media, and exhibition designers you'll take a metaphysical journey that will tap into all five of your senses.

Blending science, technology, and spirituality, the Museum of the Future allows you to live in a world that is still 50 years from now!

experiences.name: Dubai Frame: Entry Ticket + Skydeck Access
experiences.description:
For picture-perfect views and a unique look at the glitzy city's past, present, and even future architecture and achievements, step into the UAE's latest cultural landmark with Dubai Frame tickets.

Dubai Frame's towering structure is designed to link the UAE's rich past to its even richer present – and give us an insight into Emirati heritage. Step back to a time when Dubai was just a humble fishing village, and find out how it was transformed into the modern metropolis of today.

On the Sky deck level, take a look at Present Dubai with views of 'Old Dubai' to the north, and 'New Dubai' to the south. See the souks, the hotels, palaces and massive malls, and find out which skyscraper is which via special interactive screens, showing information on architecture, economy and infrastructure.

Pass through a swirly patterned tunnel with visual and audio effects and witness Future Dubai. There might not be any flying cars in these plans, but this is Dubai. Anything could happen!

experiences.name: Dubai: Sunset Desert Safari, Dune Bashing & Sandboarding + BBQ Dinner
experiences.description:
The Dubai Desert Safari takes you on a thrilling evening ride into the tranquil desert and its many incredible sights. Your excursion includes an open-topped convoy, which provides you with a unique Dune-bashing experience, as well as camel riding and a falcon picture point. 

The desert sunset adds even more beauty to the dunes, as long shadows stretch across the cool evening sands. There is a series of thrilling activities to take part in and a whole arrangement of refreshments like cold drinks, coffee and tea, in case you get exhausted after all the excitement of quad biking, sand boarding, and dune bashing. 

This ticket also includes a delicious dinner at the desert camp. All in all, the Dubai evening desert safari makes for an unforgettable experience to be shared with family or friends.

experiences.name: Sky Views Observatory: Entry Ticket + Glass Slide
experiences.description:
Located more than 200 m above Dubai, Sky Views Observatory features a 25 m long glass floor, giving you clear views of the Burj Khalifa and the city below. Walk on the clear walkway and take in the views. 

A glass elevator takes you up, with three sides offering panoramic city views that are unforgettable. 

Take an exciting trip on the Glass Slide, a see-through tube wrapping around the tower's exterior and connecting level 53 with level 52. 

Made in Germany, the slide is crafted from 12 m long sheets of quadruple-laminated glass, supported only at the top and bottom for an uninterrupted ride. You can see the city below if you dare to open your eyes.

After, when you need a break, the Panorama restaurant is available for a refreshing drink.

experiences.name: Dubai Dolphinarium: Creek Park Exotic Bird Show
experiences.description:
Get your tickets for the Creek Park Exotic Bird Show at Dubai Dolphinarium and enjoy an educational and entertaining look into the lives of the park's fascinating feathered friends.

See an artistic cockatoo who paints, a clever macaw who can hoist a flag and play basketball, and a talkative African grey parrot! 

During this experience you'll have the chance to see a range of exotic birds, including an Amazon parrot, an eclectus parrot, a sun conure, and plenty of other amazing creatures.

experiences.name: Aquaventure World: Waterpark Day Pass + Lost World Aquarium
experiences.description:
Visit Aquaventure World with your entry ticket. Slide down thrilling water rides and enjoy various pools. 

Explore the Lost Chambers Aquarium and see marine life up close. Spend time discovering the many attractions in the park.

experiences.name: Burj Khalifa: Dining Experience
experiences.description:
Visit the Burj Khalifa and enjoy dining with a view of Dubai's skyline. 

You can see the city from the world's tallest building as you choose from a variety of international dishes.

experiences.name: The Dubai Fountain Show & Lake Ride Ticket
experiences.description: Dubai doesn't do things in half measures. The choreographed lights, music, and precision aquatic geysers are a great example of the Emirates 'more is more' philosophy. With these Dubai Fountain Lake Ride tickets you'll board a boat with up to 8 people and watch the show from the best seats. See over 6,000 lights and feel the rush of 85,000 liters of leaping water up close (while staying nice and dry of course)!

experiences.name: Louvre Abu Dhabi: Skip The Line Ticket
experiences.description: The Louvre Abu Dhabi is a 'floating city' of culture, packed to the immaculately designed gills with some of the greatest art in the world. See originals by the likes of Van Gogh, Monet, and more in a mind-boggling 64,000m2 museum designed by legendary architect Jean Nouvel. It's east meets west in a groundbreaking gallery that's as much of a work of art as the masterpieces it contains.

experiences.name: Yas Island: Multi-Park Ticket
experiences.description: Visit Yas Island and enjoy multiple theme parks with one ticket. Ride roller coasters, splash in water attractions, and meet your favorite movie characters.

experiences.name: Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Visit the Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi and enjoy immersive museum access with entry to the Palaeo and life science labs. 

See dinosaur skeletons and a vast fossil, meteorite, and specimen collection, with exhibits covering the Big Bang to the future. Walk through galleries featuring life-sized fossils and different ecosystems, from icy tundras to deserts. 

Young explorers can head to the Dino Play Zone to dig for fossils and play with dinosaur models, while families can make use of WiFi, locker storage, family rooms, and prayer spaces. Located on Saadiyat Island, this museum offers a wide range of scientific displays and activities.

experiences.name: Add-on: Flash Pass (Quick Pass) for Warner Bros. World Abu Dhabi
experiences.description:
Skip the queues and maximize your fun with the **Flash Pass** at Warner Bros. World™ Abu Dhabi! 

Enjoy priority access to your favorite rides and attractions featuring iconic **DC Super Heroes, Looney Tunes, and more**. 

Whether you’re chasing thrills on **Batman: Knight Flight** or exploring **Cartoon Junction**, the Flash Pass lets you spend less time waiting and more time experiencing the excitement. 

Perfect for families and thrill-seekers looking to make the most of their day at the world’s first-ever Warner Bros. indoor theme park!

experiences.name: Qasr Al Watan Palace: Entry Ticket
experiences.description: The sublime facade of Qasr Al Watan may not be centuries old, but that detracts nothing from this glorious palace that was only completed in 2017. Explore Arabian heritage, redefined through the lens of the 21st century, and discover the UAE's opulent culture, rich craftsmanship, and time-honored traditions reflected in every inch of this stunning structure.

experiences.name: SeaWorld Abu Dhabi: Entry Ticket + Shuttle Service
experiences.description:
Explore eight themed ocean areas at SeaWorld Yas Island, Abu Dhabi, and learn about marine life from around the world. The park offers more than 100 animal experiences, presentations, and exhibits that focus on ocean ecosystems and the connection between marine species and the environment.

Learn about the connection between life on Earth and the oceans through exciting rides, up-close animal encounters, entertainment, dining, and shopping under one roof. There are indoor and outdoor rollercoasters and an indoor playground for kids of all ages.

experiences.name: Ferrari World: Entry Ticket + Shuttle Service
experiences.description: This high-octane theme park has the world's highest rollercoaster, a karting track inspired by an actual Formula One venue, and more. The world's largest indoor theme park, the whole family will be firing on all cylinders.

experiences.name: Saadiyat Mamsha Beach: Day Pass
experiences.description:
Get set for a sun-drenched escapade at Mamsha Beach, a shimmering jewel tucked away on the coastline of Saadiyat Island. This kilometer of meticulously groomed beach hosts over 400 parasol-draped sunbeds, each boasting premier views of the breathtaking azure Arabian Gulf. 

Once you've secured your ideal lounging spot, it is time to kick off the shoes and bask in relaxation. Feeling a hunger pang? No need to get up! Just scan the easy-to-use QR code on the sunbed and access Mamsha Beach's handy WhatsApp service for ordering nibbles. 

The beach's friendly staff will zip straight to you in a beach buggy, delivering orders straight to your sunbed!

experiences.name: Etihad Tower Observation Deck Admission + Food & Beverage Packages
experiences.description:
Ascend to the tippity top of Abu Dhabi's towering skyline and look out over the sparkling Arabian Peninsula with a visit to the Etihad Towers Observation Deck.

Stand at a dizzying 300 meters above the sprawling hyper-modern metropolis, and admire the stunning panoramic sweeps of urban jungle, untouched desert dunes, and the azure waters of the Persian Gulf.

Food and Beverage package
=
Enhance your visit with an irresistible food and beverage package. Choose from two delectable options that will satisfy your cravings and leave you feeling satisfied.

Indulge in the Light Snack package, which includes a mouthwatering piece of cake (selected daily) and your choice of coffee or tea – the perfect pick-me-up to fuel your day!

For a more indulgent treat, opt for the Afternoon Tea package, for a delectable assortment of cold sandwiches, scones and pastries, along with free-flowing coffee and tea, providing the perfect accompaniment to your afternoon.

experiences.name: Abu Dhabi: teamLab Phenomena
experiences.description:
Visit teamLab Phenomena, where the artwork and environment interact. Unlike static objects, these artworks change with their surroundings. For example, an ocean vortex depends on currents and fades away without them.

This concept, _Environmental Phenomena,_ highlights the bond between art and its setting. The art adapts as the environment changes. Even if disturbed, it can return to form. There are no clear borders between the art and its surroundings. The experience goes beyond the artwork, inviting you to engage with the entire space.

By becoming part of the scene, you'll notice how the art and the environment rely on each other. Your awareness will extend from the specific art pieces to the context that shapes them.

experiences.name: Al Noor Island & Butterfly House: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Visit Al Noor Island, a tropical lagoon island in downtown Sharjah, a famous spot filled with activities and sights.

Sharjah's Al Noor Island features the Butterfly House which is famous for its fairytale experience. 

Walk through green meadows, view unique art installations, and see butterflies in their natural habitat. Spend time in a butterfly house, see modern art, relax at a café, and let children play in designated areas.

experiences.name: Pearls Kingdom Waterpark: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Visit this highly-rated waterpark and find over 30 aquatic rides and slides suitable for all ages. 

Enjoy wave pools, lazy rivers, and splash zones for younger visitors. Test your courage on steep slides or relax in cabanas. This destination offers a variety of food options to refuel yourself after a day full of water activities.

experiences.name: Sharjah: Guided Tandem Paragliding Experience
experiences.description:
Try paragliding in Sharjah with a professional pilot to glide above the earth and enjoy the experience of flying.

Imagine flying through the air like a bird, with the wind on your face, and below, see a landscape that stretches out widely.

experiences.name: Al Noor Island: Entry Without Butterfly House Access
experiences.description:
Visit Al Noor Island, a tropical lagoon in downtown Sharjah. Discover a popular family spot known for its natural beauty and creative spaces.

You can walk through meadows, view unique art installations, and watch butterflies in a special section of the park (an additional fee is required). 

You will find modern art pieces, a café, and play areas for kids. Enjoy a day filled with nature, art, and fun activities.

experiences.name: Island Of Legends: Day Pass
experiences.description:
Experience family fun and adventure in Sharjah at Island of Legends. Your day pass unlocks unlimited access to 26+ rides and attractions for all ages, from kid-friendly classics to pulse-quickening adventures. 

Ride above the city on the Eye of the Emirates Wheel for sweeping views of Sharjah, then relax at scenic picnic areas throughout the park. With themed zones and convenient amenities, it’s an easy, all-day outing the whole family will love.

experiences.name: Sharjah: 30-Min Boat Tour
experiences.description:
Take a boat tour through Sharjah's Khalid Lagoon on a traditional 'Abra' and see a blend of history and culture. Cruise the calm waters and observe Sharjah’s heritage and future.

This tour offers visitors a glimpse into Emirati culture aboard handcrafted boats that reflect the UAE’s history. While sailing, see views of the city’s skyline with modern buildings and landmarks, each telling a part of Sharjah's past and present. This trip offers a unique cultural experience in the UAE.

experiences.name: Sharjah: 15-Min Boat Tour
experiences.description:
Take a boat tour through Sharjah's Khalid Lagoon on a traditional 'Abra' boat for a trip that includes history and local culture. 

Cruise the waters to explore Sharjah’s rich heritage and see glimpses of its future. This tour is popular among visitors and offers insight into Emirati culture. 

While sailing, see views of the city’s skyline with modern buildings and landmarks. Each tells a story about Sharjah's past and present, offering a unique look into the cultural center of the UAE.

experiences.name: Sharjah: Dune Buggy Experience + Dinner
experiences.description:
Prepare for a desert adventure with a two-seater dune buggy ride in the Mleiha desert. Enjoy the scenic backdrop of a UNESCO World Heritage Site while having fun and tasting great food.

Start with a camel ride across the dunes, guided by experts who share stories about the region's heritage. Loof at the vast landscape and then try sandboarding on the dunes.

experiences.name: Dune Buggy & Private Dinner in the Dunes in Mleiha National Park
experiences.description:
Discover an exciting desert adventure with the dune buggy experience. Enjoy a thrilling ride through the desert and admire the views of untouched desert beauty.

Enjoy a camel ride and sandboarding at Zerzura. Then, the adventure leads to a delicious Arabic feast in a private spot among the dunes.

experiences.name: Dune Buggy Experience & Fossil Discovery in Mleiha National Park
experiences.description:
Explore the desert in a top-quality Dune Buggy. The buggies are designed for safety and comfort, and a team is ready to assist with any issues.

Discover the UNESCO World Heritage Site of Mleiha, see Camel Rock, and find real fossils at Fossil Rock.

Enjoy a smooth ride on adjustable off-road suspension, and rest assured that each buggy is cleaned thoroughly after every tour. A photography and videography service is also available to capture your experience.

experiences.name: Sagrada Familia: Fast Track Ticket + Optional Towers
experiences.description:
Visit Sagrada Familia and view its intricate architecture and impressive stained glass windows. Walk through the basilica and observe the detailed facades and sculptures. 

Notice the unique design elements created by Antoni Gaudí. Optionally, access the towers for a higher vantage point.

experiences.name: Park Güell: Entry Ticket + Audio Guide
experiences.description:
Visit Park Güell and explore its unique architectural features. See the colorful mosaics and winding pathways designed by Antoni Gaudí. 

Listen to the audio guide to learn about the park's history and design. Enjoy the views of Barcelona from various vantage points within the park.

experiences.name: Montjuïc Cable Car: Roundtrip Ticket
experiences.description:
Ride in comfort as you soak up panoramic views of Barcelona, with Montjuïc Cable Car tickets, and see the city in style.

This Montjuïc Cable Car connects Barcelona to the top of Montjuïc hill, where you can get the very best views of the Catalan capital. 

Take a quick funicular ride from Paral·lel metro station to Parc de Montjuic, then switch over to the cable car for a 750-meter trip to the top of Montjuïc. You can hop on and off at Parc de Montjuïc, Miramar, and Castell de Montjuïc.

On the way to the top, enjoy a bird's-eye view of Barcelona. Your final destination is the 17th-century hilltop fortress and former prison, Montjuïc Castle. 

While atop Montjuïc, try spotting landmarks like the Sagrada Familia and Torre Glòries. Don't forget to take in views of the harbor – it's just as beautiful. Other places of interest in this area are cultural highlights like the Fundació Joan Miró, Poble Espanyol, and the Museu Nacional d'Art de Catalunya.

experiences.name: Casa Batlló: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Visit Casa Batlló and see its stunning architectural details. Notice the colorful mosaic tiles and intricate ironwork. 

Walk through the beautifully designed rooms and admire the flowing, organic shapes. Take in the unique design elements of this famous building.

experiences.name: Sagrada Familia: Skip The Line Ticket + Guided Tour
experiences.description:
Visit the Sagrada Familia and observe its intricate architecture. Notice the detailed facades and towering spires designed by Gaudí. 

Enter the basilica to see the stunning stained glass windows casting colorful light. Learn about the history and significance of this famous structure on a guided tour.

experiences.name: Casa Milà - La Pedrera: Entry Ticket + Audio Guide
experiences.description: With its flowing exterior and the whimsical chimney pots on its roof, Casa Milà – known locally as _La Pedrera_ – represents Gaudí at the top of his game. The ornate interior is also the handiwork of the great Catalan architect. Avoid burning up in Barcelona's daytime heat and get right into this modernist masterpiece, with Casa Milà tickets.

experiences.name: Barcelona Aquarium: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Visit the Barcelona Aquarium in Port Vell, one of Barcelona’s main attractions. It has been updated with new spaces and displays that focus on marine life and environmental education.

At the entrance, you’ll see an interactive digital floor and new areas such as Journey to the Depths, an immersive room.

The aquarium includes more than 80 tanks, both Mediterranean and tropical, with around 11,000 animals from 600 species.

Walk through an 80 m underwater tunnel in the Oceanarium, where you can see sharks, moray eels, rays, and other marine life.

There are interactive areas for visitors of all ages. In Aqua Protectors, children can create a digital fish and see it on screen. The mangrove zone includes interactive games and sensory installations for learning.

experiences.name: Barcelona: Audio Guide App
experiences.description: This Barcelona audio guide is your pocket-sized key to the city. Consult your digital city map and navigate between more than 100 points of interest, via designated routes or by plotting your own path. At each location – from La Rambla to Park Guell and Lionel Messi's Camp Nou – you'll hear up to two minutes of cultural context from expert locals.

experiences.name: Barcelona Bus Turístic: Hop-on Hop-off Bus Tour
experiences.description:
With this comprehensive bus tour, you can see all the sights from your comfy seat, and then hop off at any stop you'd like. Then hop back on the next bus, and continue to get to know the Catalan capital.

With two routes, you can cover the whole city! Choose a 24 or 48-hour ticket and enjoy some of the most varied sightseeing around!

The Blue Route takes you through all the essential must-sees, such as Passeig de Gràcia, Park Güell, Güell Pavilions, Tibidabo, and Pedralbes. And of course, for football fans ... Spotify Camp Nou!

The Red Route covers the Museu Nacional d'Art de Catalunya, Plaça d'Espanya, Sagrada Família, as well as views from the highest mountain in Barcelona: Montjuïc. This route goes all the way to the beaches.

experiences.name: Hola Barcelona: Public Transport Card
experiences.description:
Tapas by tram, Casa Batlló by bus, or Camp Nou by coach. With the Hola Barcelona Travel Card, transport is so fluid it feels like part of the fun! 

Explore freely for periods of 2, 3, 4 or 5 consecutive days and do like the Catalans do, navigating the city's public transport network like a pro.

experiences.name: Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel: Fast Track Ticket
experiences.description:
Use these fast-track entry tickets to tour the Vatican Museums and see masterpieces of Renaissance art. Walk through galleries filled with sculptures, paintings, and historical artifacts. 

Look up at the Sistine Chapel's famous ceiling, painted by Michelangelo. Visit the Raphael Rooms and study the intricate frescoes.

experiences.name: Colosseum & Roman Forum + Audio Guide
experiences.description:
Visit the Colosseum and Roman Forum with an audio guide. Walk through the ancient amphitheater where gladiators once fought. 

See the ruins of temples, arches, and courtyards in the Roman Forum. Listen to detailed historical insights provided by the audio guide.

experiences.name: Rome Pantheon: Fast Track Ticket + Digital Audio Guide
experiences.description:
Skip the long lines and get to know the Pantheon thanks to your digital audio guide. 

You'll learn about the building's origins as a pagan temple, its later conversion into a Christian church, and its important place in Roman history. 

The audio guide willl give you information about the Pantheon's famous dome and the oculus. 

You'll also hear stories, myths, and legends connected to the Pantheon, helping you better appreciate both historical facts and the folklore that surrounds the site.

experiences.name: Rome Tourist Card
experiences.description:
Build your perfect Rome adventure with a custom package! 

Cover all the essentials by selecting from top attractions and experiences.

experiences.name: Colosseum, Roman Forum & Mamertine Prison + Audio Guide
experiences.description:
Visit the Colosseum and see the ancient amphitheater where gladiators once fought. Walk through the Roman Forum to view the ruins of temples and government buildings. 

Explore the Mamertine Prison and learn about the prisoners who were held here, including Saints Peter and Paul. Then, access the Colosseum for an inside perspective on one of history's most iconic arenas.

experiences.name: Castel Sant'Angelo: Entry Ticket + Audio Guide App
experiences.description: On the banks of the Tiber stands a towering cylindrical structure steeped in history – it’s a mausoleum, a monument, and a museum. Get these Castel Sant'Angelo tickets and step back into the drama of Rome's history. Plus, get amazing rooftop views of the Eternal City!

experiences.name: Colosseum, Arena & Roman Forum + Audio Guide
experiences.description:
Visit the Colosseum to see the ancient amphitheater where gladiators once fought. Walk through the Arena and imagine the historic events that took place there. 

Explore the Roman Forum and view the ruins of important government buildings from ancient Rome. Use the audio guide to learn about the significance of each site as you move through the area.

experiences.name: Vatican Museums, Sistine Chapel & St. Peter's Basilica: Guided Tour
experiences.description:
Visit the Vatican Museums to see an extensive collection of art and historical artifacts. Walk through the Sistine Chapel and look up at Michelangelo's famous ceiling. 

Continue to St. Peter's Basilica, where you can see its grand architecture and religious significance. Each location offers a rich display of culture and history.

experiences.name: Vatican City Pass
experiences.description:
Access high-demand attractions with this convenient pass. 

**Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel: Skip The Line**
Quickly access the Vatican Museums to see a vast collection of art and the famous Sistine Chapel featuring Michelangelo’s ceiling fresco.

**St. Peter’s Basilica**
Meet a host for a guided entry to St. Peter's Basilica and use an audio guide to discover its architectural highlights and Michelangelo’s _Pietà_ at your own pace.

**Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore + Museum**
Explore the Papal Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore, including its chapels and the _Miracle of the Snow_ mosaic, as well as artifacts in the adjoining museum.

experiences.name: Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore: Priority Entry + Museum
experiences.description:
Visit the Papal Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore and its museum areas. Explore one of Rome’s four major basilicas, walk through its chapels, and see the _Miracle of the Snow_ mosaic in the Loggia of the Blessings. 

You can also view various artifacts and items in the museum and learn about the history of this important church.

experiences.name: Seine River: Cruise by Bateaux Parisiens
experiences.description: Enjoy panoramic views of the Notre Dame Cathedral, the Musée d'Orsay, and many more UNESCO World Heritage Sites from the waters of the Seine. Hop on for an unforgettable trip through the heart of Paris.

experiences.name: Palace of Versailles: Entry Ticket + Gardens + Estate of Trianon
experiences.description: Versailles conjures up notions of a grand palace and vast landscaped gardens. But did you know there's also a third part? With this all-area-access ticket, you'll be able to explore the Hameau de la Reine, Marie Antoinette's private compound where she played pretend as a humble peasant.

experiences.name: Museum of Modern Art Paris: Lee Miller Exhibition
experiences.description:
If you've climbed to the top of the Eiffel Tower, then you've probably enjoyed a bird's-eye view of the Musée d'Art Moderne (MAM Paris) in the Palais de Tokyo. 

Take a break from the hustle and bustle of the city and get inspired by MAM Paris's huge collection of almost 15,000 works from the 20th century's major art movements and most influential artists.

See examples of Fauvism, Cubism, Abstractions, New Realism, School of Paris, Narrative Figuration, Conceptual Art, and more.  

This Museum of Modern Art Paris ticket allows you to access the current temporary exhibition – there's always something new to see here!

experiences.name: Seine River: Cruise by BATEAUX-MOUCHES®
experiences.description:
Explore the city of love with a romantic river cruise! Seeing Paris from the Seine is an experience to remember forever. 

There's the Eiffel Tower casting its shadow over the city, and Notre-Dame Cathedral, still impressive despite the disastrous fire. Gaze at the Gothic palace and former prison known as the Conciergerie, and see the Musée d’Orsay, a former railway station that's now home to French art.

This scenic tour includes commentary along the route. Listen, learn, and fall in love!

experiences.name: Musée d'Orsay: Renoir and Love (1865-1885)
experiences.description:
Pierre-Auguste Renoir (1841–1919) was a major figure of Impressionism and, alongside Manet, Degas, Monet, and Caillebotte, one of the 19th century’s great painters of modern life.

Between 1865 and 1885, he developed a light, fluid style and a new repertoire of modern scenes, capturing relationships between men and women in theatres, cafés, guinguettes, boulevards, and gardens.

From March 17th to July 19th, 2026, Renoir and Love: A Joyful Modernity (1865–1885) reexamines this pivotal period and, for the first time since the last Renoir retrospective in Paris in 1985, brings together in France some of the artist’s greatest masterpieces.

experiences.name: Disneyland® Paris: Admission Ticket
experiences.description:
Visit Disneyland® Paris and enjoy a variety of thrilling rides and attractions. Encounter beloved Disney characters throughout the park. 

Explore themed lands such as Adventureland, Fantasyland, and Discoveryland. Watch live shows and parades that bring Disney stories to life.

experiences.name: Fondation Louis Vuitton: Premium Access
experiences.description:
Get your Fondation Louis Vuitton tickets and secure premium access to the iconic gallery designed by Frank Gehry. 

Fondation Louis Vuitton founder Bernard Arnault wanted to gift Paris with a remarkable space for art and culture. And it's that – and then some! Filled with natural light and air, it's hard to imagine a better place to see hot exhibitions. Especially with this VIP ticket.

experiences.name: Sainte-Chapelle & Conciergerie: Entry Ticket
experiences.description: When modern Paris has overwhelmed you with its boutiques, bicycles, and baguettes, step back in time at two of its most interesting and historical landmarks in medieval Palais de la Cité - once the residence of the Kings of France. Sainte-Chapelle with its mesmerizing stained glass windows was home to Christ's Crown of Thorns, while the Conciergerie was home, or rather _prison_ to Marie-Antoinette!

experiences.name: Musée de l'Armée - Les Invalides & Napoleon's Tomb: Entry Ticket
experiences.description: Paris's Army Museum (Musée de l'Armée) is one of the three largest arms museums in the world, and home to one of the biggest military history and art collections on the planet. None other than Napoleon Bonaparte has been resting here since 1861, in his tomb. Get priority entrance into this military-minded collection of arms, armor, and art.

experiences.name: Musée Marmottan Monet: Skip The Line Ticket
experiences.description:
No museum in the world boasts as many Monet paintings as Musée Marmottan Monet. If that wasn't reason enough to go, then its enormous collection of work by other Impressionist icons should be enough to seal the deal! 

Visitors can admire around 100 of Monet's masterworks. See 'Impression, Sunrise', which gave rise to the Impressionist movement, and his much-loved 'Water lilies'. Also on display are pieces by the likes of Gauguin, Renoir, and Degas, taken from Monet's personal collection. 

Access to the popular temporary exhibitions is also included in your Musée Marmottan Monet ticket.

experiences.name: SUMMIT One Vanderbilt: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Get ready to reconsider what is possible. A new reality awaits you at SUMMIT. Across three floors and three unique experiences, you’ll be challenged, inspired, and thrilled.

Extend the horizons of your imagination through mind-bending, multi-sensory installations produced by top artists, all while enjoying one of the best views in Manhattan. 

On the top floor, soak up spectacular 360 views of New York City and beyond, including close-ups views of the Empire State Building and the Chrysler Building.

experiences.name: The Museum of Modern Art (MoMA): Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Art is cool. New York is cool. Checking out art in the Museum of Modern Art? Now *you're* cool. MoMA is an art lover's paradise, a place to soak up art in an elevated atmosphere. And if you're not yet a lover of modern and contemporary art, this museum – filled with Van Goghs, Warhols and Picassos – might turn you into one.

This ticket includes access to MoMA PS1 within 14 days of your visit. Don't miss this contemporary art instiitution located in Queens. From DJs to outdoor events and interactive installations, there's always something new to see!

experiences.name: Edge NYC: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Visit Edge NYC, home to the highest outdoor sky deck in New York City.

Begin your visit on Level 4 of Hudson Yards, where interactive installations featuring light, reflections, and sound lead to the observation deck. 

Then head outside to enjoy 360° views of Manhattan and landmarks such as Central Park and the Statue of Liberty from more than 1,100 ft (338 m) above the city.

For a different perspective, step onto the glass floor and look down at the streets below through angled glass walls. Edge also features the Skyline Bar & Café, where drinks and light snacks are available for purchase.

Visit during the day, at sunset, or in the evening to experience New York City from above.

experiences.name: Bronx Zoo: Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
A day at Bronx Zoo will let you see everything from lions and zebras on the African Plains to the eagles and owls of the Birds of Prey exhibit. 

There's also a huge array of attractions for visitors of all ages. Immerse yourself in the enchanting Butterfly Garden, where colorful butterflies flutter around in a serene and magical setting! 

Let the kids have up-close encounters with prairie dogs, North American porcupine, fennec foxes, and pet the farmyard animals at the Children's Zoo, and step into the lush JungleWorld to encounter exotic creatures in a fun, tropical rainforest.

Explore the vast grounds of the Bronx Zoo with ease on the convenient Zoo Shuttle, which lets you hop on and off at various stops to see different exhibits. And take a spin on the Bug Carousel with its intricately carved insect-themed figures. 

For an adventurous walk, set off on the Nature Trek, where you can explore nature trails and observe all kinds of wildlife in their natural habitats.

experiences.name: Top of the Rock: General Admission
experiences.description: Believe the hype. Nestled at the height of 30 Rockefeller Plaza, Top of the Rock’s three levels of indoor and outdoor observation decks deliver spectacular, unobstructed views of the city skyline. With terraces facing east, west, north, and south, Top of the Rock’s panoramic sights make it the ultimate observation deck in NYC. Explore 9,500 square feet of unobstructed outdoor viewing space, the most of any New York observatory. Soaring 70 floors above Rockefeller Center, it’s one of the top things to do in New York City.

experiences.name: American Museum of Natural History (AMNH): Entry Ticket
experiences.description:
Enter the American Museum of Natural History and explore its vast exhibits. Observe the impressive dinosaur skeletons and the detailed dioramas of various ecosystems. 

Visit the planetarium to see stunning visuals of the universe. Examine the extensive mineral and gem collection that showcases Earth's geological wonders.

experiences.name: New York Aquarium: Entry Ticket
experiences.description: The New York Aquarium offers an intimate peek into the underwater world with a variety of aquatic displays, starring penguins, sea lions, sharks and more! From the _Aquatheater_'s sea lion shows to the conservation-minded displays of _Glover’s Reef_, there's plenty to keep the most excitable budding marine biologist transfixed for hours with these New York Aquarium tickets.

experiences.name: Old Westbury House and Gardens
experiences.description:
Enter a whole new world as you walk through the magnificent gates that open up to the grand Westbury house and gardens. 

The stunning mansion reflects English architecture from the 1700s and is all for you to explore! Admire the impressive antiques displayed and have a look at one of the finest art collections from around the world. 

Extending beyond the house are the lush green gardens dotted with colorful flowers, manicured to perfection. 

Promenade arm-in-arm with your family and friends and feel like a proper royal at Old Westbury in Long Island.

experiences.name: New York Botanical Garden: All Garden Pass
experiences.description:
Swap the concrete jungle for some plant-based chill time in the greenest corner of the Big Apple, and wander through the floral wonderland of New York Botanical Garden. 

Escape to the city’s natural oasis this winter. Explore NYBG’s 250-acres, including 50 gardens and collections that feature everything from a stunning maple collection to the plants and flowers in the Perennial Garden. There is so much beauty to explore in the quiet moments of winter. Take advantage of the season and explore the Garden’s various plants, growing in every corner.

experiences.name: Central Park Zoo: Entry Ticket
experiences.description: The Central Park Zoo may be small in size (6.5-acre) but it’s definitely not short of fun. At this intimate attraction, you can really get up close and personal with a variety of wildlife. There’s a reason why this zoo inspired the animated film _Madagascar_. Snow leopards, bears, sea lions... it's pretty wild here!

experiences.name: Embassy of the Free Mind: Entry Ticket + Audio Guide
experiences.description:
Visit the Embassy of the Free Mind, a space where you can explore centuries of knowledge. See how science, spirituality, art, and history intersect.

Located in the 17th-century House with the Heads, the Embassy has a vast book collection from the Bibliotheca Philosophica Hermetica, spanning over 2,000 years. Engage in discussions with researchers, relax in the garden, or take a break in the café.

The Embassy features a research library, study areas, and exhibitions. It promotes global dialogue and invites you to reflect on life's big questions through its resources and displays.

experiences.name: Amsterdam: City & Region Travel Ticket
experiences.description:
Getting around a city that's not your own can be tough. So, when you arrive in Amsterdam, you'll want a hassle-free travel ticket that gets you where you need to go.

Not only does this Amsterdam travel ticket get you from Schiphol Airport to central Amsterdam, with unlimited transport around the city, but you can also use it to visit surrounding towns like Volendam, Zaanse Schans and Haarlem. Ideal, if you've found a great hotel deal outside the city!

experiences.name: GVB Amsterdam: Public Transport by Tram, Bus, and Metro
experiences.description:
Amsterdam public transport is easy to manage with these tickets! Everything is well-connected by public transport in Amsterdam!

This pass takes the stress out of getting from point A to B. Just flash your GVB public transport pass and you can ride all the trams, buses, and metros you like. It's the best way to see the sites without having to brave the bike lanes.

experiences.name: Amsterdam: Canal Cruise from Central Station
experiences.description:
Take a canal cruise from Central Station to see Amsterdam from the water. View historic buildings, charming bridges, and houseboats along the route. Pass by landmarks like the Anne Frank House and the Rijksmuseum. 

Float through the famous Canal Ring, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Enjoy the changing scenery as you glide through the heart of the city.

experiences.name: Van Gogh Museum: Entry Ticket
experiences.description: See the largest collection of Van Gogh's paintings, plus works by many of his contemporaries, and trace his fascinating development as an artist. These Van Gogh Museum tickets, valid for a specific timeslot, are the only way to get in fast.

experiences.name: Moco Museum Amsterdam: Entry Ticket + Audio Guide
experiences.description:
Visit the Moco Museum Amsterdam, a modern and contemporary art museum located in Amsterdam's Museum District.

See more than 100 artworks by over 35 artists, including paintings, sculptures, installations, and digital experiences. 

Featured artists include Banksy, Andy Warhol, Keith Haring, Jean-Michel Basquiat, Yayoi Kusama, Damien Hirst, KAWS, Takashi Murakami, and Daniel Arsham.

Explore galleries featuring modern, contemporary, digital, and immersive art. Your ticket includes a complimentary audio guide available in different languages.

The museum is located on Museumplein, close to many of Amsterdam's major cultural attractions.

experiences.name: Amsterdam: Train, Tram, Bus, and Metro Travel Ticket
experiences.description:
The last thing you want to do when you arrive in a new city is fumble around trying to figure out how to use the public transport system. With the Amsterdam Travel Ticket, there's no fumbling involved. 

This Amsterdam public transport pass provides you with transport to and from Schiphol Airport (just exchange your pass at a listed terminal) as well as access to all GVB buses, trams, ferries and metro services once you're in the city. The whole of Amsterdam is your oyster!

experiences.name: Amsterdam: Canal Cruise from Rijksmuseum
experiences.description:
Join a canal cruise departing from the Rijksmuseum and get a chance to see the beautiful architecture lining the waterways. 

Take in views of historic buildings and bridges as you glide through the canals. Spot landmarks and famous sights along the route and enjoy the chance to take photos from a different perspective.

experiences.name: Amsterdam: Train from Schiphol Airport to Central Station
experiences.description:
Did you know that Schiphol is one of the biggest airports in the world? Arriving at Amsterdam's airport can be overwhelming for the first time. If you're wondering how to get from Schiphol into central Amsterdam, ignore the many taxis (which will generally charge you 50 euros to take you to the city center), buses, and private airport transfers.

The train is the fastest connection between the airport and the center of Amsterdam. It departs around every 10 minutes from early morning until midnight and the travel time is only 15 minutes. You will arrive at Amsterdam Central Station, right next to some of the city's most popular hotels. This is also the central hub for taxis, metros, trams and buses all over the city. Plus, the beautiful 19th-century train station is a bit of a cultural landmark itself too!

experiences.name: Moco Museum Amsterdam + Canal Cruise
experiences.description:
Skip the line at the Moco Museum to see Banksy's rare pieces and other contemporary masterpieces. Then, hop on a boat for a one-hour cruise through the city's canals, complete with an audio guide. This package offers a unique way to appreciate Amsterdam's art scene and historical canals. 

**Moco Museum Amsterdam: Skip The Line Ticket**  
See original artworks by Banksy and other contemporary and postmodern artists in Amsterdam's Villa Alsberg, featuring over 50 Banksy pieces and works by Kusama, Lichtenstein, and Dali.

**Amsterdam: 1 Hour Canal Cruise from Rijksmuseum**  
Go on a classic canal cruise departing from Amsterdam's city center, offering a unique perspective on the city's canals, bridges, and historical sites with an audio guide.
